summary: Curing Video Management feature testing completed successfully. All 10 backend API tests passed and all frontend UI elements verified working.
test_credentials: Site Engineer: engineer@constructionos.com (via Demo Access button)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple curing video records during testing for project 'Vinoth Kumar Villa'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Curing Video feature is fully functional. Backend APIs at /api/site-engineer/curing-video/* work correctly. Frontend has Curing Video button in SE Dashboard header and Curing Video tab with history table.

backend: POST /api/site-engineer/curing-video - Create curing video record with curing_done=True - PASSED
POST /api/site-engineer/curing-video - Create curing video record with curing_done=False - PASSED
GET /api/site-engineer/curing-video/history - Get all records for SE - PASSED
Full workflow: Create -> Verify in history -> Mark WhatsApp sent -> Verify update - PASSED
Permission check: Non-SE role cannot create curing records (403) - PASSED
frontend: SE Dashboard header has 'Curing Video' button - VERIFIED
Clicking 'Curing Video' button opens dialog with project selector, auto-captured date, curing done toggle, Save & Send button - VERIFIED
SE Dashboard has 'Curing Video' tab (7th tab) - VERIFIED
Curing Video tab shows history table with columns: Date & Time, Project, Curing Video status, WhatsApp status, Actions - VERIFIED
Curing Video tab has project filter dropdown - VERIFIED
Curing Video tab has 'New Record' button - VERIFIED
Creating new record via dialog works and record appears in history - VERIFIED
Resend button appears for records with curing_done=True and whatsapp_sent=False - VERIFIED
